blogInputSubtitle: Paste a blog post URL to extract all photos
errorInvalidUrl: Please enter a valid Naver Blog URL
errorTimeout: Request timed out. Please try again later.
errorServerUnavailable: Server temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errorServerError: Server processing failed. Please try again later.
errorNetworkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again later.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.desc: The URL you requested doesn't exist or has moved. Pick somewhere to continue.

onboardingDesc:
1. Paste or enter a Naver Blog post URL
2. Click "Fetch Photos" to extract all images
3. Browse, select and download photos in the gallery

root.title: Naver Blog Image Downloader
root.taglineLine2: Enter a URL to automatically extract and batch download all photos from blog posts
root.cardAppDesc: iOS & Android mobile app with batch download and photo gallery saving
root.cardWebDesc: Browser-based online tool, no installation required

mobile.docTitle: Mobile App — Naver Blog Photo Downloader

hero.title: Naver Blog Photo Downloader
hero.tagline: Enter a URL, download all photos in one click

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Simple, fast, and smart photo downloading

batch.title: Batch Download
batch.desc: Automatically extract all photos from Naver Blog posts and download them in batch

gallery.title: Save to Gallery
gallery.desc: Downloaded photos can be saved directly to your device gallery for easy browsing and sharing

cache.title: Smart Cache
cache.desc: Downloaded photos are cached locally for instant loading on subsequent visits

async.title: Async Processing
async.desc: Cloud-based async extraction handles large photo sets without timeouts

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Download all photos in just four simple steps

step1.title: Paste URL
step1.desc: Copy a Naver Blog post URL and paste it into the app

step2.title: Get Photo List
step2.desc: Tap the button to automatically extract the photo list

step3.title: Wait for Extraction
step3.desc: Cloud-based async processing with real-time status updates

step4.title: Save to Gallery
step4.desc: Select photos and save them to your device gallery in one tap

screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.subtitle: Clean and intuitive Material Design interface

web.docTitle: Web Version — Naver Blog Photo Downloader
web.title: Web Version
web.tagline: No installation required — extract and download Naver Blog photos directly in your browser

featureUrl.title: Paste URL to extract
featureUrl.desc: Enter a Naver Blog post URL and all original-resolution photos are extracted automatically

featureGrid.title: Photo wall browsing
featureGrid.desc: Responsive image grid with full-screen viewing and zoom

featureBatch.title: Batch download
featureBatch.desc: Select specific photos or pick all in one tap; download as a zipped bundle

featureI18n.title: Multi-language support
featureI18n.desc: Traditional Chinese / English / 日本語 / 한국어 with light and dark themes

web.tech: Tech stack: Vite · React 19 · TypeScript · React Router v7 · Zustand · Tailwind CSS 4 · react-i18next
